content.en:
"It's time to become a child of the void!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

So, he went to the Tianlin Realm Tianfeng Sea with a copy of his body to see the Heavenly Wind Source God.

When he saw the Heavenly Wind Source God, the Heavenly Wind Source God gave Ye Tian a token.

"Ye Tian, this token is the treasure that goes to the Void Source Palace, otherwise, with your speed, if you want to fly to the Void Source Palace, I am afraid it will take a long time, and using this token you can reach the Void Source Hall in an instant. Tianfeng Source God introduced.

Ye Tian took the token and said gratefully, "Thank you, Chief." "

Subsequently, he refined the token and urged it.

Rumble!!!!!

An unimaginable spatial force enveloped Ye Tian, instantly piercing through the distance of the Endless Source Sea, allowing him to come to a magnificent temple that could not be described in words.

This is the Void Source Temple.

When he arrived at the Void Source Temple, a magnificent voice entered his soul.

"Examiner, do you want to conduct the Void Child assessment?"

Ye Tian replied, "Yes!"

At this time, the magnificent voice continued, "About to enter the Void Tower!"

"Examiners need to pass the first layer of the Void Tower to obtain the title of Void Child, through the second level of the Void Tower, they can obtain the title of Void Godson, and through the third layer of the Void Tower, they can obtain the title of Lord of the Void. "

What the?

What else is the title of Void God Son, Lord of the Void?

Why hadn't he heard of it, and the Heavenly Wind Source God hadn't told him, didn't they know?

No, it's impossible not to know, maybe no one has done it.

It was precisely because no one had achieved it that the Heavenly Wind Source God did not mention it.

Rumble!!!

Ye Tian was sent to the first layer of the Void Tower by the Void Source Palace, and soon ushered in his opponent.

Dense robberies appeared, all of them were tribulation beasts comparable to the realm of ordinary third-class invincibles, such robbers were very weak, and even the ordinary third-rank invincibles of the eternal name level forces could be easily killed, let alone Ye Tian.

However, there were too many of them, tens of thousands, where could those third-rank invincible people be able to compete with so many robbers.

"No wonder it's so difficult to become a child of the void, few third-class invincibles can do it!"

Ye Tian sighed.

Kill!!!

Ye Tian severely injured and even killed one by one, but more beasts rushed over.

Therefore, he must always use the defensive invincible skill, and give full play to his speed advantage, and use the speed invincible ancestral skill to the extreme.

It can be said that if a third-class invincible person has shortcomings, even if his strength is very strong, he is afraid that it will be difficult to pass such an assessment.

Ye Tian's strength was much stronger than Luo Ge, and even Luo Ge passed through the first layer of the Void Tower and became the Son of the Void.

Therefore, Ye Tian would naturally be able to pass through the first layer of the Void Tower, and it would be very easy.

As time passed, all the Raiders on the first floor were killed.

However, Ye Tian found that the robber beast he killed did not give birth to the Blood, Bone, and Origin Rule Pills, but turned into a stream of energy and was absorbed by the Void Source Palace.

Obviously, the Void Source Hall has the means to create a robbery beast, and it can recover the robbery beast and continue to create it.

Otherwise, if an invincible person came to assess, where would there be so many robberies in the Void Source Hall for them to kill?

"Those who have passed the assessment, you have passed the first layer of the Void Tower and obtained the title of Son of the Void, do you want to take the second level of the assessment?"

"Yes!"

Ye Tian replied.

He also wanted to know how difficult the second layer assessment of the Void Tower was, and why no invincible person had passed the second layer assessment and become a Void God Son so far.

Wow!

Ye Tian was teleported to the second layer of the Void Tower, and soon he met his opponents.

The opponent of the second layer of the Void Tower is still a robbery beast, but it is obviously not an ordinary robbery beast, and it is still a third-class invincible person in terms of breath, but it is much stronger than the robbery beast on the first layer.

Moreover, there are too many robberies in the second layer, far exceeding those in the first layer.

The fight has begun!

Ye Tian found that it was difficult for him to kill a robbery beast with one blow, at least it would take a few moves to kill a robbery beast, and with so many robbery beasts besieging him together, it was impossible for him to deal with a robbery beast with all his strength.

Gradually, he found that he could only consume it, and there was no way to kill so many invincible beasts.

Soon, Ye Tian gave up.

This level can't be passed at all, which makes people extremely desperate.

At this time, he also understood why the other invincibles did not submit the Void God Son, so they could not be born.

Coming out of the Void Tower, Ye Tian came to the main hall of the Void Source Palace.

At this time, the Void Source Hall transmitted some information to him, allowing him to know more about the Void Source Hall and the benefits of the Void Child.

Using the Void Source Hall to travel is only one of the benefits, and he can also use the Void Tower to exercise his combat power, and he can enter the Void Tower again and again, and he only needs to pay a small fee, and the cost is the Origin Rule Robbery Crystal.

"No wonder Luo Ge has so much combat experience, it seems that he often enters the Void Tower to cultivate. Ye Tian guessed.

Other than that.

Only the children of the void can comprehend the Void Source Monument, which is the greatest opportunity of the Void Source Temple, and even the supreme is extremely greedy.

But if it weren't for the Son of the Void, even the Supreme wouldn't be able to enter the Void Source Hall to comprehend the Void Source Monument.

The time for the Children of the Void to comprehend the Void Source Monument is very limited, and they need to queue up, only the Son of the Void God does not need to queue.

Every ten Children of the Void can comprehend the Void Source Monument for about a period of time, and of course, the Children of the Void also need to pay a reward, that is, Void Points.

Void Points are not exchanged for resources, and can only be obtained through a few specific channels.

The first is to become a child of the void, the Void Source Hall rewards 1000 points, the second is to become a supreme one, you can get 10000 points, the third is to give points to other children of the void, and the fourth is to complete the task of the Void Source Temple.

Basically, if you want to get a lot of points, you can only rely on the quest of the Void Source Temple.

"Machine Spirit, list the tasks of the Void Source Palace!"

Ye Tian pleaded.

The grand voice, also known as the machine spirit, lists some tasks.

[Mission: Kill the Source Sea Life Devouring Source Dragon, a Devouring Source Dragon is worth 100,000 points. 】

[Mission: Find the Void Source Crystal, a Void Source Crystal, 100 points.] 】

[Mission: Condense the Void Source Body and reward 30,000 points.] 】

......

Ye Tian looked at the tasks one by one, and he was very excited, but these tasks were too difficult, and there was no easy task.
